WinoMation

Electron Automation Powershell
React Threejs WebRTC Express

Adhd Focus Mate

Developed an ADHD-focused productivity app centered on the behavioral psychology of 'body doubling.' Engineered a real-time, peer-to-peer focus matrix that uses social accountability to help users overcome task paralysis and executive dysfunction. Combined this collaborative anchoring technique with a 3D gamified reward system.

View Project
NextJs AI Pyodide Scrollma

Ai for Humans

Engineered "AI for Humans," an interactive web application designed to demystify complex AI and Machine Learning concepts for complete beginners.It adapts technical lessons into four distinct learning modes relying heavily on custom SVG animations and micro-interactions to explain complex algorithms from first principles.

View Project
Electron Node Automation

WinoMation

A drag-and-drop Windows automator with 40+ reusable workflows. It simplifies complex shell tasks and saves hours each week on repetitive desktop processes.

View Project

01. The Philosophy

Code is not just logic; it's a sensory experience. I bridge the gap between high-performance engineering and whimsical, playful design systems.

02. The Process

Iterate. Break. Fix. Polish. I use motion as a primary narrative tool to guide users through complex data sets and interactions.

03. The Stack

Built on the foundation of React, GSAP, and Three.js, with a religious devotion to 3px black borders and vibrant color palettes.
